landmarks.name: CST – Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Terminus
landmarks.description: UNESCO World Heritage railway terminus — Mumbai's main long-distance and suburban rail hub with iconic Victorian Gothic architecture.

landmarks.name: Bandra Kurla Complex (BKC)
landmarks.description: Mumbai's premier financial and commercial hub hosting RBI, SEBI, stock exchanges, and major bank HQs.

landmarks.name: Nariman Point
landmarks.description: South Mumbai's CBD on the tip of the peninsula — home to the Stock Exchange and corporate towers with sea views.

landmarks.name: Andheri Railway Station
landmarks.description: Western Railway's busiest suburban station and intersection of Metro Line 1 and Western Line local trains.

landmarks.name: Dadar Station
landmarks.description: Key interchange connecting Western Line, Central Line, and Harbour Line suburban trains in central Mumbai.

landmarks.name: Gateway of India
landmarks.description: Iconic 1924 colonial arch monument overlooking the Arabian Sea — Mumbai's most famous landmark and tourist gateway.

landmarks.name: Marine Drive
landmarks.description: The Queen's Necklace — 3.6 km seafront promenade along Back Bay, ideal for walking and evening strolls.

landmarks.name: IIT Bombay – Powai
landmarks.description: Premier technology institute on the shores of Powai Lake, with 14,000 students and world-class research facilities.

landmarks.name: Lilavati Hospital – Bandra
landmarks.description: Flagship multi-specialty hospital in Bandra, renowned for cardiac, neurology and oncology departments.

landmarks.name: CSIA – T2 International Airport
landmarks.description: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport Terminal 2 — India's 2nd busiest airport serving 45M+ passengers/year.

landmarks.name: Phoenix Market City – Kurla
landmarks.description: 2.1 million sq ft shopping destination with 500+ brands, multiplex, food court, and entertainment zone in Kurla.

landmarks.name: Film City – Goregaon
landmarks.description: Famous Dadasaheb Phalke Chitranagari — 520-acre studio complex that produces the bulk of Bollywood productions.

landmarks.name: Colaba Causeway
landmarks.description: Colonial-era commercial street in South Mumbai lined with heritage buildings, street markets, cafes and antique shops.

landmarks.name: Worli Sea Link (South End)
landmarks.description: Bandra-Worli Sea Link southern anchorage — cable-stayed bridge reducing Western suburbs to South Mumbai time by 30 min.

landmarks.name: Thane Railway Station
landmarks.description: Thane — large suburban railway junction connecting Central Line and Trans-Harbour Line to Navi Mumbai and beyond.

bus_routes.name: BEST A/C Volvo – CST to BKC
BEST Airport Express – CST to CSIA
